query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct, publishedToFeed FROM games WHERE awayTeam = 'NYY' AND homeTeam = 'SF' ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 1;
